name: Deep Learning Mastery
description: A comprehensive path from neural network basics to advanced architectures like Transformers and GANs. Ideal for learners ready to go beyond introductory AI.
author: Dr. Priya Mehta

name: Frontend Architecture
description: Modern frontend patterns covering component design, state management, and CSS layout systems. Build scalable, maintainable web applications from day one.
author: Marcus Chen

name: Statistical Thinking
description: Develop intuition for probability, Bayesian reasoning, and data analysis. Focuses on conceptual understanding over formulas.
author: Dr. Elena Rossi

name: Discrete Math for CS
description: Essential discrete mathematics for computer science: graph theory, combinatorics, and logic. The mathematical backbone every developer needs.
author: James Okafor

name: Learning How to Learn
description: Evidence-based study techniques grounded in cognitive psychology. Master spaced repetition, active recall, and cognitive load management.
author: Dr. Sarah Kim
